chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI IInd Appeal No. 136 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For order as to non-prosecution 10.10.2025 None present for appellant ---------- None present for appellant. No intimation is received. This has been the case for last four dates of hearing. Additionally office objections have also not been complied with. It appears that appellant has lost interest in the matter. Dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Ashraf
